title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Angel One Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Angel One Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Angel One Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Thane team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Angel One Ventures Solutions:
Angel One Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Angel One Ventures Solutions!
